caption: The video depicts a medical simulation scenario, likely part of a training exercise labeled "Sim Week." A group of healthcare professionals, dressed in blue scrubs and wearing masks, are gathered around a patient mannequin. They appear to be engaged in a collaborative effort, with one individual holding a tablet displaying what seems to be an ultrasound image. The setting is a clinical environment, as indicated by the medical equipment, storage shelves, and a biohazard bin in the background. The participants are focused on the task at hand, suggesting they are practicing diagnostic or treatment procedures under controlled conditions. The scene conveys a sense of teamwork and professionalism as they work through the simulation.
